name: Transportation Electrification Strategy & Planning
description: Comprehensive strategy and deployment planning for the electric vehicle ecosystem, focusing on infrastructure, utility programs, and fleet transitions.

itemOffered.name: Commercial Charging Infrastructure Deployment
itemOffered.description: Full-cycle support for EV charging infrastructure, from inception through implementation.

itemOffered.name: Utility Program Design & Regulatory Support
itemOffered.description: Expertise in designing utility rates and programs that support grid health and EV growth.

itemOffered.name: Enterprise-Wide Transportation Electrification Planning
itemOffered.description: Developing comprehensive roadmaps for organizations to transition to electric mobility.

itemOffered.name: Fleet Electrification & V2G Strategy
itemOffered.description: Specialized planning for medium- and heavy-duty fleet transitions and vehicle-to-grid integration.

itemOffered.name: Clean Energy Initiatives & Community Choice Aggregation
itemOffered.description: Advisory on CCA and clean energy projects that drive sustainable transportation.
